title: RFP Extraction — UDM Output
description: Flat JSON contract for a funding announcement extracted to the Unified Data Model as extended for research administration. Scalar fields populate a single RFA record; the nine list-valued fields each create typed requirement rows categorized for downstream ingest.

rfa_id.description: Stable identifier for the announcement. When the sponsor publishes an opportunity number, use it prefixed with the sponsor code (e.g., 'NSF-26-508'). Null when no canonical identifier is available; the ingest service will assign one.

rfa_number.description: Official announcement number as published by the sponsor (e.g., '26-508', 'PA-24-246', 'DE-FOA-0003117'). No prefix.

rfa_title.description: Full title of the funding opportunity, including any track or component designation.

sponsor_name.description: Full name of the lead sponsoring agency or organization (e.g., 'National Science Foundation'). Do not emit an identifier or abbreviation; the ingest service resolves this to a Sponsor_Organization_ID.

program_code.description: The sponsor's internal program or division code (e.g., 'NSF/TIP/ITE', 'NIH/NCI/CCR'). Null when not specified.

announcement_url.description: Canonical URL of the announcement on the sponsor's site.

opportunity_number.description: Grants.gov or other portal opportunity ID, when distinct from rfa_number.

cfda_number.description: CFDA / Assistance Listing number(s). Comma-separated when the announcement lists multiple (e.g., '47.070, 47.076').

announcement_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the announcement was posted.

submission_deadline.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the final full proposal deadline. For multi-round announcements, use the LAST round's full proposal deadline; document every round in special_conditions. Null only when the announcement is open-ended (rolling submissions).

loi_deadline.description: ISO date of the Letter of Intent / Notice of Intent deadline. For multi-round announcements, use the LAST round's LOI deadline; document every round in special_conditions.

preproposal_deadline.description: ISO date of the preliminary proposal / pre-application / white paper deadline, when distinct from LOI.

funding_floor.description: Minimum award amount per award in USD (plain number, no currency symbol). Null when not stated.

funding_ceiling.description: Maximum total award amount per award in USD (plain number). When the announcement states a per-year cap over a multi-year project, emit the per-award total (per-year cap × maximum years). Null when not stated.

expected_awards.description: Estimated number of awards. When stated as a range ('4 to 6'), use the upper bound.

max_duration_months.description: Maximum project duration in MONTHS (not years). Convert years to months by multiplying by 12. Use the standard maximum; document any conditional extension (e.g., '4th year with phase-out plan') in special_conditions.

submission_method.description: Submission portal as named by the sponsor (e.g., 'Research.gov', 'Grants.gov', 'eRA Commons', 'PAMS').

rfa_status.description: Lifecycle state. Use 'Active' unless the announcement explicitly indicates closed, archived, or draft status.

required_documents.description: Documents the proposal must or may include (Project Summary, Project Description, Budget Justification, Biosketches, etc.). Both required and explicitly-optional documents go here; distinguish via is_required.

formatting.description: Formatting constraints: page limits, font, margins, line spacing, numbering.

review_criteria.description: Merit review criteria (standard agency criteria plus any solicitation-specific additions). Include weights in description when stated.

eligibility.description: Eligibility rules for organizations, PIs, Co-PIs, and personnel. Include 'no restriction' statements explicitly — the absence of a restriction is itself a compliance fact.

budget_constraints.description: Budget rules: caps, F&A limits, cost sharing, equipment thresholds, participant support, subaward rules, salary caps.

compliance.description: Compliance disclosure requirements (COI, SFI, RCR training, foreign interference, responsible conduct of research, etc.).

submission_requirements.description: Submission logistics beyond the portal name: file formats, collaborative proposal rules, AOR requirements, multi-institution coordination.

special_conditions.description: Special award conditions and post-award obligations. Also the correct home for per-round deadline details in multi-round announcements, conditional duration extensions, and coordination/collaboration mandates.

pappg_deviations.description: Places where the announcement explicitly deviates from the agency's parent proposal guide (PAPPG, SF424, Merit Review Guide, etc.). Highest-risk items for compliance review.

label.description: Human-readable name of the requirement, preserving the announcement's exact wording for prescribed terms.

code.description: Machine-readable code (SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE, max 50 chars). Omit or set null when no natural code exists; the ingest mapper will auto-generate one from the label.

description.description: Expanded detail or context — conditions under which it applies, consequences of noncompliance, related requirements.

page_limit.description: Page or word limit for documents and formatting items. Null for non-paginated items.

format_spec.description: Format specification for documents and formatting items (e.g., 'PDF, single-column', '11pt Times New Roman').

is_required.description: True for mandatory requirements, false for optional. For 'no restriction' eligibility entries, is_required is true (the check itself is required).

source_section.description: Citation to the source location in the announcement or parent guide (e.g., 'PAPPG II.D.2.b', 'Section IV.C', 'NOT-AG-24-012'). Populate whenever traceable.

structured_rule_type.description: Machine-readable rule type for entries that can be enforced programmatically. Use a stable snake_case identifier.
